message:
feat(vdbe,core): add UPDATE/DELETE RETURNING clause support (bd-331r)

Extend RETURNING support beyond INSERT: UPDATE uses emit_returning after
the Insert opcode (row already re-inserted with updated values). DELETE
reads RETURNING columns before the Delete opcode since the row is still
present. Connection.rs UPDATE/DELETE dispatch returns VDBE result rows
when RETURNING is present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
